dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7400 IH: Making Homeownership Affordable Again Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Mace (for herself and Ms. Boebert) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to exclude all gain from the sale of a principal residence or any residence which is sold to a first-time homebuyer, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Making Homeownership Affordable Again Act.

section.header: Full exclusion of gain from sale of principal residence or residence sold to first-time homebuyer

subsection.header: Elimination of dollar limitations on exclusion of gain

paragraph.text: Section 121(b) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

subparagraph.text: by redesignating paragraphs (3) and (5) as paragraphs (1) and (2), respectively.
Section 121(c) of such Code is amended—

clause.text: in paragraph (1), by striking , and subsection (b)(3) and all that follows through 2 years and inserting , and subsection (b)(1), shall not apply, and
in paragraph (2)(A)(ii), by striking subsection (b)(3) and inserting subsection (b)(1).

subparagraph.text: Section 121(d) of such Code is amended—

clause.text: in paragraph (9)(A), by striking in subsections (a) and (c)(1)(B) and inserting in subsection (a), and
in paragraph (12)(A), by striking in subsections (a) and (c)(1)(B) and inserting in subsection (a).

subsection.header: Allowance of exclusion of gain from sales to first-Time homebuyers

paragraph.text: Section 121(c)(2)(B) of such Code is amended—

subparagraph.text: by striking exchange is by reason of and inserting
by striking unforeseen circumstances. and inserting unforeseen circumstances, or, and
by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: Section 121(c) of such Code, as amended by the preceding provisions of this Act, is amended by adding at the end the following new paragraph:

For purposes of this subsection, the term first-time homebuyer means any individual if such individual (and if married, such individual’s spouse) had no present ownership interest in a principal residence during the 3-year period ending on the date of the sale or exchange of the property to which this subsection applies.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to sales and exchanges made after the date of the enactment of this Act.
